name: financial-ui-suite
description: Production-grade financial UI design skills for Claude Code. Two composable layers: financial-ui-patterns (correctness — tabular nums, semantic tokens, tick flash, accessibility, charts) and financial-ui-personas (aesthetic — 10 distinct visual systems: Bloomberg terminal, TradingView, Robinhood, Coinbase, Financial Times, Polygon/Stripe, Wise, TastyTrade, Uniswap, iOS Stocks).
